definition: on the subject of; concerning

sentence.en: The documentary provides a comprehensive overview about the long-term effects of climate change on coastal infrastructure.
sentence.uz: Hujjatli film iqlim o'zgarishining qirg'oq infratuzilmasiga uzoq muddatli ta'siri haqida keng qamrovli ma'lumot beradi.

definition: in the time following an event or another period of time

sentence.en: After the successful deployment of the new software update, the engineering team monitored the system for any unexpected bugs.
sentence.uz: Yangi dasturiy ta'minot yangilanishi muvaffaqiyatli o'rnatilgandan keyin, muhandislar jamoasi tizimni kutilmagan xatolar mavjudligiga kuzatishdi.

definition: another time; once more

sentence.en: Despite the initial failure of the prototype, the determined researchers decided to run the complex simulation again.
sentence.uz: Prototipning dastlabki muvaffaqiyatsizligiga qaramay, qat'iyatli tadqiqotchilar murakkab simulyatsiyani yana o'tkazishga qaror qilishdi.

definition: the invisible gaseous substance surrounding the earth, a mixture mainly of oxygen and nitrogen

sentence.en: The implementation of stringent industrial regulations significantly improved the overall air quality in the bustling metropolis.
sentence.uz: Qat'iy sanoat qoidalarining joriy etilishi gavjum metropolda umumiy havo sifatini sezilarli darajada yaxshiladi.

definition: the whole quantity or extent of a particular group or thing

sentence.en: The chief executive ensured that all regional managers were fully prepared for the upcoming corporate restructuring.
sentence.uz: Bosh ijrochi direktor barcha mintaqaviy menejerlar bo'lajak korporativ qayta qurishga to'liq tayyor bo'lishlarini ta'minladi.

definition: moving in a constant direction on a path or line

sentence.en: Local authorities have proposed constructing a new bicycle lane along the riverbank, which would significantly reduce traffic congestion in the city centre.
sentence.uz: Mahalliy rasmiylar daryo qirg'og'i bo'ylab yangi velosiped yo'lagi qurishni taklif qilishdi, bu esa shahar markazidagi tirbandlikni sezilarli darajada kamaytiradi.

definition: in addition; too

sentence.en: Not only does the new policy aim to improve employee well-being, but it also provides flexible working hours to boost overall productivity.
sentence.uz: Yangi siyosat nafaqat xodimlarning farovonligini oshirishga qaratilgan, balki umumiy unumdorlikni oshirish uchun moslashuvchan ish soatlarini ham taqdim etadi.

definition: the form of the indefinite article 'a' used before words beginning with a vowel sound

sentence.en: Acquiring an advanced degree in environmental science can open up numerous career opportunities in both the public and private sectors.
sentence.uz: Atrof-muhit fani bo'yicha ilmiy darajaga ega bo'lish davlat va xususiy sektorlarda ko'plab martaba imkoniyatlarini ochishi mumkin.

definition: used to connect words of the same part of speech, clauses, or sentences

sentence.en: The government must invest heavily in renewable energy sources and simultaneously phase out its reliance on fossil fuels to combat global warming.
sentence.uz: Hukumat qayta tiklanadigan energiya manbalariga katta sarmoya kiritishi va ayni paytda global isishga qarshi kurashish uchun qazib olinadigan yoqilg'iga qaramlikni bosqichma-bosqich kamaytirishi kerak.

definition: used to refer to an additional person or thing of the same type

sentence.en: While some students prefer traditional classroom learning, another group argues that online education offers greater flexibility and personalized pacing.
sentence.uz: Ba'zi talabalar an'anaviy sinf ta'limini afzal ko'rishsa, boshqa guruh onlayn ta'lim ko'proq moslashuvchanlik va shaxsiy sur'atni taklif qilishini ta'kidlaydi.

definition: used to refer to one or some of a thing or number of things, no matter how much or how many

sentence.en: The researchers failed to find any conclusive evidence linking the new medication to the reported side effects.
sentence.uz: Tadqiqotchilar yangi dori vositasini bildirilgan nojo'ya ta'sirlar bilan bog'lovchi hech qanday ishonchli dalil topa olmadilar.

definition: second person singular present and first, second, third person plural present of be

sentence.en: There are numerous underlying factors contributing to the recent economic downturn, including inflation and supply chain disruptions.
sentence.uz: So'nggi iqtisodiy pasayishga hissa qo'shadigan ko'plab asosiy omillar, jumladan inflyatsiya va ta'minot zanjiridagi uzilishlar mavjud.

definition: located or situated on every side

sentence.en: The city council implemented new zoning laws around the historical district to preserve its unique architectural heritage.
sentence.uz: Shahar kengashi tarixiy tuman atrofida uning noyob me'moriy merosini saqlab qolish uchun yangi hududlashtirish qonunlarini joriy qildi.

definition: used in comparisons to refer to the extent or degree of something

sentence.en: The transition to renewable energy is not as straightforward as many policymakers initially anticipated.
sentence.uz: Qayta tiklanadigan energiyaga o'tish ko'plab siyosatchilar dastlab kutganidek oddiy emas.

definition: expressing location or arrival in a particular place or position

sentence.en: The international summit aimed at mitigating climate change will be held in Geneva next month.
sentence.uz: Iqlim o'zgarishini yumshatishga qaratilgan xalqaro sammit kelasi oy Jenevada bo'lib o'tadi.

definition: to or at a distance from a particular place, person, or thing

sentence.en: The company decided to shift away from traditional marketing strategies and focus entirely on digital campaigns.
sentence.uz: Kompaniya an'anaviy marketing strategiyalaridan uzoqlashishga va butunlay raqamli kampaniyalarga e'tibor qaratishga qaror qildi.

definition: in, to, or towards an original place or condition

sentence.en: After years of extensive renovations, the museum has finally restored the ancient artifacts back to their original glory.
sentence.uz: Ko'p yillik keng ko'lamli ta'mirlash ishlaridan so'ng, muzey nihoyat qadimiy artefaktlarni o'zining asl holatiga qaytardi.

definition: exist or occur

sentence.en: It is crucial that environmental sustainability be prioritized in all future urban development projects.
sentence.uz: Barcha kelajakdagi shaharsozlik loyihalarida ekologik barqarorlikka ustuvor ahamiyat berilishi o'ta muhimdir.

definition: for the reason that; since

sentence.en: The flight was severely delayed because of unprecedented weather conditions across the eastern seaboard.
sentence.uz: Sharqiy qirg'oq bo'ylab misli ko'rilmagan ob-havo sharoitlari tufayli parvoz jiddiy ravishda kechiktirildi.

definition: past participle of be

sentence.en: There has been a noticeable shift in consumer preferences towards ethically sourced and manufactured products.
sentence.uz: Iste'molchilarning xohish-istaklarida axloqiy jihatdan olingan va ishlab chiqarilgan mahsulotlarga nisbatan sezilarli o'zgarishlar kuzatilmoqda.

definition: during the period of time preceding a particular event or time

sentence.en: Before implementing the new tax regulations, the government conducted a comprehensive socio-economic impact assessment.
sentence.uz: Yangi soliq qoidalarini joriy etishdan oldin hukumat ijtimoiy-iqtisodiy ta'sirni har tomonlama baholashni o'tkazdi.

definition: at a lower level or layer than

sentence.en: The region's annual rainfall has dropped significantly below the historical average, leading to severe droughts.
sentence.uz: Mintaqadagi yillik yog'ingarchilik miqdori tarixiy o'rtacha ko'rsatkichdan sezilarli darajada pastlab, jiddiy qurg'oqchilikka olib keldi.

definition: at, into, or across the space separating two objects or regions

sentence.en: The diplomatic negotiations aimed to strike a delicate balance between national security and international cooperation.
sentence.uz: Diplomatik muzokaralar milliy xavfsizlik va xalqaro hamkorlik o'rtasida nozik muvozanat o'rnatishga qaratilgan edi.

definition: used to refer to two people or things, regarded and identified together

sentence.en: The proposed legislation has garnered substantial support from both environmental activists and industry leaders.
sentence.uz: Taklif etilayotgan qonunchilik ham ekologik faollar, ham sanoat yetakchilari tomonidan sezilarli qo'llab-quvvatlandi.

definition: used to introduce a phrase or clause contrasting with what has already been mentioned

sentence.en: The technological advancements are impressive, but they raise profound ethical questions regarding data privacy.
sentence.uz: Texnologik yutuqlar ta'sirli, biroq ular ma'lumotlar maxfiyligi borasida chuqur axloqiy savollarni tug'diradi.

definition: identifying the agent performing an action

sentence.en: The novel approach to waste management was pioneered by a team of dedicated researchers from a local university.
sentence.uz: Chiqindilarni boshqarishga bo'lgan yangicha yondashuv mahalliy universitetning fidoyi tadqiqotchilari jamoasi tomonidan ishlab chiqilgan.

definition: past tense of come

sentence.en: The realization that their business model was unsustainable came only after substantial financial losses.
sentence.uz: Ularning biznes modeli barqaror emasligini anglash faqatgina katta moliyaviy yo'qotishlardan keyingina sodir bo'ldi (keldi).

definition: be able to

sentence.en: Integrating artificial intelligence into healthcare can significantly enhance diagnostic accuracy and patient outcomes.
sentence.uz: Sun'iy intellektni sog'liqni saqlash tizimiga integratsiya qilish tashxis aniqligini va bemorlarning sog'ayish natijalarini sezilarli darajada oshirishi mumkin.

definition: move or travel towards or into a place thought of as near or familiar to the speaker

sentence.en: Scholars from various disciplines have come together to address the multifaceted challenges of global poverty.
sentence.uz: Turli fan sohalari olimlari global qashshoqlikning ko'p qirrali muammolarini hal qilish uchun bir joyga yig'ilishdi (kelishdi).

definition: used to indicate possibility or past ability

sentence.en: If the current trend of deforestation continues, it could lead to the extinction of countless indigenous species.
sentence.uz: Agar o'rmonlarni kesishning hozirgi tendentsiyasi davom etsa, bu ko'plab mahalliy turlarning yo'q bo'lib ketishiga olib kelishi mumkin.
